mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Bridging Past & Present
mission.p1: The project combines cultural heritage, field data collection, and digital technology to preserve the invisible traces of architectural tradition.
mission.p2: Every stonemason mark tells a story - of the craftsman who carved it, the guild they belonged to, and the monument they helped build. Stone Mark brings these stories to light.

cta.title: Join Us in Preserving History
cta.desc: Be part of a global movement to document and protect the craft traditions that shaped our world
cta.footer: Open collaboration ensures the project remains transparent, reliable, and useful to both the public and the academic community.

partner.title: Our Institutional Partner
partner.subtitle: Portuguese Association for the Urban Rehabilitation and Protection of Heritage
partner.desc: APRUPP is a non-profit association dedicated to the study, protection, and promotion of urban heritage, with a special focus on the preservation of traditional construction techniques and the memory of the built environment.
partner.heritage_desc: Promoting the safeguarding and appreciation of architectural and cultural heritage.
partner.urban_desc: Supporting sustainable urban rehabilitation and the revitalization of historic centers.
partner.civic_desc: Encouraging community participation in the protection of heritage.
partner.knowledge_desc: Disseminating research and best practices in heritage conservation.

hero.label: About the Project
hero.title:
Preserving History,
One Mark at a Time.
hero.desc: Stone Mark is a web application dedicated to the documentation and exploration of stonemason marks — the unique symbols engraved by ancient craftsmen on monuments across history.

features.label: Key Features
features.title: Tools for Heritage Explorers
features.desc: Designed to make your journey through history seamless, engaging, and unforgettable

1.title: Capture & Submit Marks
1.desc: Photograph and submit authentic stonemason marks directly from the app, contributing to a growing digital archive of craftsmanship heritage.

2.title: Search Monuments
2.desc: Discover monuments and stonemason symbols through a fast and intuitive search experience.

3.title: Advanced Filtering
3.desc: Filter marks by monument to explore detailed cultural patterns and associations.

4.title: Bookmarks & Collections
4.desc: Save your favourite monuments or marks to personalized collections — perfect for research, teaching, or exploration.

5.title: Geolocation on Map
5.desc: Explore nearby stonemason marks and monuments in real-time using an interactive map with precise geolocation features.

6.title: Cultural Preservation
6.desc: Support the documentation and preservation of stonemason heritage through community participation and open historical data.

unesco.label: Global Initiative
unesco.title: Partnering with UNESCO
unesco.desc: Stone Mark is being developed in collaboration with UNESCO to preserve and promote world heritage sites. With proven technology and a scalable architecture, we're preparing for international expansion.
unesco.impact_desc: Empowering millions to connect with heritage
unesco.growth_desc: Built for scale with proven architecture
